en: And you're probably with that blonde girl, who always made me doubt
ko: 아마 그 금발 여자와 함께일 거야.

en: She's so much older than me, she's everything I'm insecure about
Well yet today I drove through the suburbs, cause how could I ever love someone else
And I know we weren't perfect, but I've never felt this way for no one
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay, now that I'm gone
Guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
ko: 내게 쓴 그 노래의 의미가 아니었던 것 같아.

en: Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street
ko: 영원하다고 했지만, 이제 너의 거리를 혼자 지나가고 있어.
